news.headline: France's ex-president Sarkozy escapes second ankle tag sentence
news.summary: Nicolas Sarkozy will not serve time with an electronic ankle tag for corruption during illegal funding of his 2012 re-election bid. A source close to the case says the former French president's "advanced age" played a role in the decision.

news.headline: Middle East war live: Trump says Iran war will be 'over quickly'
news.summary: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday evening that he believed the war in Iran would be "over quickly" but threatened to resume his bombardment of the country if negotiations fell apart.
